sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua la ke’n ka sa thei ta ding;
Jesuh kiang ka tawlnga ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ni khat ni’n ka tawlnga dinga,
Honpa Pasian’ mai ka mu ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ni khat ni ciang ka ngak kongpi,
Hong kihong ding kham kong khakpi;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka van inn lam theilo pi-in,
Ka pai ding hun hong tun ciangin,
Amah’n inn hong tunpih ding hi.
